column2: The 102-Year-Old Hawaiian Hotel Where Pork Chops Are King

Danny always gets the pork chops. She prefers the fried opelu. I wanted the butterfish. We've been ordering the same dinner in the cherry wood paneled dining room of this guesthouse for the past two decades. It's a regular gathering place for friends and family, called ohana..."
